title: Export wine: self-certify wine produced in Great Britain
body: "Your self-certification will confirm your wine complies with EU regulations. You must attach your self-certificate to your consignment of wine when it is exported.   There’s a different process to export or move wine that is not produced in Great Britain.   "

taxons.title: Import, export and distribution of food
Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
